desc: NOTA extension programming is structural matching over nodes. The parser first preserves raw delimiter structure, object counts, sigils, and nested block shapes; then ordered macro-node definitions match that structure using constraints, most-specific first, and absence of a match is a formatting or specification error.
Every registration of a new referent is gated by the guardian, the same as records, not admitted by a self-service synonym check alone *validation*

The Spirit guardian is the single locus of judgment and the model checks everything semantic — consistency, duplication, trample, non-intent — with only structural admission staying upstream as input validation

A well-specialized, clean-context, well-instructed guardian can outperform the submitting agent at judging a capture even on a nominally weaker model, because the agent is buried in noise from messy interaction and code while the guardian judges one case at full attention with extensive on-point instructions. The lever for a smarter guardian is specialization, clean context, and training, not raw model strength; a larger-context model like DeepSeek Pro helps only when paired with proper training. *admission control*

The goal of context maintenance is to reduce the number of reports without losing information, by agglomerating topics: multiple reports on a topic are rewritten and merged into one Refresh report per topic, preserving the un-contradicted and un-superseded substance in a better form. Refresh is the report variant tag — the Capital word after the number — for such a rewritten or agglomerated report; one Refresh report may merge several source reports, which are then deleted with the Refresh report as the landing witness.

The guardian must always return a well-formed NOTA response; a malformed guardian response must never happen. Its instructions must specify the exact response format unambiguously, with the verdict grammar and the closed rejection-reason set generated into the prompt, plus a parse-and-retry and a shape test, so an out-of-format reply is impossible in practice. *admission control*

All Spirit Signal, Nexus, and SEMA operations must be declared in the schema files first; generated schema types are the source of every operation data type, and handwritten Rust may only implement behavior on those generated nouns.

The canonical pipeline: authored schema (NOTA) deserializes via the structural-macro-node codec directly into schema-in-rust (typed, rkyv-serializable, canonical round-trip), which then lowers into Rust interface code.

The guardian needs proper per-operation prompts: each operation type gets detailed guidance with worked examples of what passes as an accept and what is rejected and why. Over-train the guardian first with rich, detailed instructions and many examples, then scale back once it works, because the guardian calls are currently undertrained. *admission control*

Every component exposes its two contracts, the working signal and the meta policy signal, as two thin CLI clients: the working client named after the component and the meta client prefixed meta-. This is one extracted pattern applied across all components with minimal per-component hand-coding, not re-implemented per component. Spirit spirit and meta-spirit are the first instance.

Every component engine in the workspace triad architecture defines and uses its Signal, Nexus, and SEMA interfaces in schema, and conducts core logic through schema-emitted traits whose methods take and return root types of the concerned interfaces — adapting Spirit 1326 (spirit-engine-specific) to the workspace-wide component-triad pattern. The trait surface is uniform across components; each component's runtime is a composition of schema-emitted trait implementations.

The upgraded justification is a strongly-typed structured argued case: typed verbatim testimony with optional antecedents, plus a reasoning that argues why the record should be admitted and why its certainty, domain, kind, and importance are right. The claim is the operation own Entry, never a justification sub-field. It is never a stringly-typed blob. Redundant citation-signal tags are excluded; a cited record relationship is carried by the operation or by the reasoning prose. *admission control*

Ship the lean core of the intent-justification upgrade first: typed verbatim testimony plus a check that the quoted words actually support the claimed certainty, with a binary guardian verdict. Defer the elaborate court structure, the typed warrant sub-sections, a separate stakes-basis slot, and cross-record motions-as-precedent, to a later phase, adding each only where the lean core demonstrably falls short. *admission control*

Anything that needs to be done to test something is done IN the test. When a test is blocked by missing infrastructure, the test mocks, stubs, hand-codes, or builds the minimal version of the missing piece to make the test run. Coming back with we cant test this because of a blocker is the wrong response - unblock the blocker IN THE TEST, exercise the design end-to-end, see what actually works, what does not, and how it works. Tests are where you get to do whatever you need to do; thats their point.

Supersede must support replacing a retired set with multiple new intents in one atomic operation, not just a single replacement. The reason is correctness, not convenience: when the content of the retired records splits into several new records, replacing them with a single record loses meaning and the guardian should refuse it, so superseding with several replacements must be one operation the guardian judges as a whole, asking whether the new set together preserves the kernel of the retired set. *admission control*

MetaSignal is the canonical name for the policy and authority contract; OwnerSignal is deprecated. Every component policy contract is named meta-signal then component uniformly, including ones whose repos are absent or still owner-signal-prefixed today — meta-signal-persona, meta-signal-criome, and meta-signal-agent are born meta-signal, never owner-signal. This confirms and generalizes record r9qy from its specific repo rename list to the universal naming principle, and answers system-designer report 77 decision 1: from-scratch policy contracts are born meta-signal.

The cloud-designer prototype method is a development cycle: mine existing intent + reports + code for working solutions, implement a fully-working prototype that uses all designed components, then audit the prototype against the full designed surface. Audit gaps drive iterative growth of the underlying components themselves — each prototype iteration grows BOTH prototype completeness AND the component capabilities the prototype needs to use fully. Component development is co-developed through prototype use, not as separate work.

No stringly-typed types anywhere — the psyche calls them bullshit types. Prefer value enums that break a field into its closed set of possibilities; enums are clear and self-descriptive and still carry the data each variant owns. Reach for an enum over a bare string or bool whenever a field has enumerable cases.

An intent submission carries a justification that argues the case for the intent: the submitting agent sells why this should become intent, embedding the psyche verbatim words with the surrounding context of what was discussed and proposed. A justification can quote several verbatim fragments and can reference previously recorded intents. Verbatim spans in a justification are surrounded by asterisks. *admission control*

Schema struct bodies must not accept the old field Type pair syntax. Struct bodies are positional lists of field types; an explicit field name different from the type uses the dot differentiator such as source.TypeReference. The schema reader should reject the old pair form rather than silently accepting it.

The schema creates the data types and those generated types must be used in the logic flow, not ignored or bypassed. Logic threads the schema-emitted types end to end rather than re-deriving or re-encoding their content by hand.
Spirit category is a closed enum with a broad category-theory starting set, not a narrow free-text topic field.

Every repository must have an INTENT.md, and it is the FIRST file to create for a repo — the most important file, answering: what is this repository for? A repo's INTENT.md holds the most important AND ONLY the most important design intent and design constraints that concern that project; it is curated and distilled to the essential, not an accumulation of everything. Isolating the most important design constraints into each repo's INTENT.md is a priority, and Psyche reports explaining a repo should be based on its reviewed/curated INTENT.md. Per psyche 2026-06-04.
The intent unit is named domain, a specific grounded subject grouped under broad areas; the terms category and topic are retired
Valid lane shapes are <role>, second-<role>, third-<role>, and qualified-prefix-<role> (e.g. system-<role>, cluster-<role>, pi-<role>).
Domain tree depth is proportional to intent density, not a structural exception: Software nests deeper because it holds far more, while sparse Hardware stays one level.

DomainScope operations must stay typed all the way through matching, expansion, and equivalence; converting recursive enum values into Debug strings or Vec String paths is not an acceptable implementation.

For the current SEMA version-control implementation, keep the work in sema-engine now rather than creating a new sema-vcs repository. A later extraction remains possible after the engine nouns settle.

The existing agent component is draft evidence with low authority; if it conflicts with the current Spirit intent redesign and broker-daemon harness architecture, operator should disregard, replace, or delete the old shape rather than preserve compatibility. *maintenance*

Certainty is the burden of proof the verbatim testimony must clear. The submitting agent proposes a burden by claiming a certainty level, and the psyche verbatim quotes must clear that level on their modal strength. An over-claimed certainty on hedged words fails its burden and is rejected; the guardian never silently lowers the level. This makes honest understatement the rational strategy because a lower claim faces an easier bar. *admission control*

Full correctness means every pipeline step is genuinely implemented end-to-end and does its real job; green tests are not correctness. Design-implementation avoidance — the common bootstrapping failure mode — is forbidden.

The basic baseline meta operations of every meta-signal-component contract are daemon configuration: the meta plane carries a Configure operation that applies the component typed daemon configuration. This is the foundational content of the meta contract; component-specific privileged runtime actions build on top. Consistent with binary-only startup, where the daemon startup record is itself a binary meta-signal configuration message and later configuration arrives as authenticated meta-signal Configure messages, never flags.

The Spirit triad engine should be interface-first: schema-defined root interfaces generate the Signal, Nexus, and SEMA message types and actor traits; handwritten runtime code should stay terse, matching decisions, invoking algorithms, routing replies, and never bypassing the schema-defined trait boundaries. Signal owns communication triage and final replies, Nexus owns central decision-making across the outer Signal side and inner SEMA side, and SEMA owns durable state management. The intended flow is Signal input to Nexus input, Nexus to SEMA input when state work is needed, SEMA output back to Nexus, Nexus output back to Signal, and Signal output back to the client.

Certainty and importance are orthogonal axes and must never be conflated. A tentative idea can carry very low certainty yet high importance: it is not decided but it matters. Capture sets the two independently and neither substitutes for the other.

Spirit records should distinguish certainty from weight: certainty is confidence in the statement, while weight is accumulated importance or reinforcement, especially for composite records derived from multiple source records.

Intent capture must preserve the psyche modality and never upgrade tentative wording into confident assertion: when the psyche hedges with I think, I feel like, could, or maybe, the recorded certainty must stay low and the wording must not be rewritten from could into should or from a feeling into a fact. The guardian needs visibility into how the psyche actually worded the statement and rejects over-stated capture. The guardian stays a binary yes-or-no gate and never silently lowers certainty itself, because a rejection sends the thinking back to the submitting agent, the highest-thinking-power model, who reconsiders and rewords; keeping the gate binary keeps the thinking where it belongs. *admission control*

Cross-tree domain relations are symmetric equivalence only — synonyms that retrieve together both ways. Directional subsumption between domains is dropped because the nested tree and scope-prefix matching already carry all hierarchy.

Schema files live with their contract's source-of-truth, and a repo may hold multiple .schema files (one per contract) named <crate>/<contract-name>.schema, superseding the prior one-schema-per-repo assumption.

The local LLM API token is installed into local agent configuration through the standard managed Home-profile path as a command-backed gopass reference - for Pi an auth.json entry whose value runs gopass at call time - never a literal key written into Nix source or models.json. Applies the never-expose-plaintext rule of records 1011 1012 to the local-agent auth path; the prometheus llama-server now enforces the token so the prior dummy sk-no-key-required no longer authenticates.

Introduce an archive system as a specialized sema-database that holds exactly one kind of archived object, with the database name stating what it archives. Pair it with a small archive-retrieving tool that reads archived objects back. Designer concepts the shape, operator implements. This is the durable home for collected removal candidates and other archived component data; the concept validates the exact shape.

owner-signal-persona is the deprecated OwnerSignal form and should become meta-signal-persona, and signal-engine-management is an off-pattern name that should fold into the signal-persona / meta-signal-persona pair.
Short headers should encode enough top-level variant shape for cheap routing.

The -next replacement repos have won and their originals are deprecated: nota-next is the canonical NOTA implementation and schema-next with schema-rust-next the canonical schema-derived stack, superseding the old nota and schema repos which the psyche no longer cares for. The -next suffix is now vestigial ancestry and should be dropped, renaming the replacements to their base names.

Ownership split refining bcca: orchestrate owns cell instance lifecycle policy and ordering, systemd owns the OS process supervision and restart-survival, and terminal-control owns the durable sema instance record used to reattach.
A content daemon must have no ambient access to system private-key material and, handed a path to a private key, must be unable to read it. *access control*
The Rust emitter must consume the serialized assembled form (checked-in or build-time-emitted .asschema NOTA files), not the in-memory Rust value directly.
The structural-match pattern language is a typed enum of primitives — arity, atom-case, atom-sigil, delimiter-type, atom literal — bounded so the macro data stays serializable.

schema macro application is iterative to a fixed point; each pass identifies macro positions in the namespace and applies their lowerers; macros can introduce new macros into the namespace which trigger further passes; iteration continues until no macro positions remain and the namespace is pure typed enums, structs, and newtypes
Storage-contract schemas live with the daemon because daemon and database operate as one unit in the same compilation unit.
The signal/sema macro auto-derives documentation via a Help variant on every enum.
Design documents for the nota/schema next stack should use short, focused mermaid graphs.

Personal and private information needs a privacy-aware intent-capture path; assistant and counselor work should avoid leaking private material into the ordinary Spirit database while the private intent substrate is being designed.

Speech-to-text support for video work should be tiered: use the best practical transcription path on the large AI node, while keeping a smaller local speech-to-text option for less capable machines. *natural language processing*
Each scenario explanation in nota/schema design docs should be grounded directly in Nix tests.
Router talks to the agent component (not to harness directly); harness is given to a durable agent and can be abstracted behind the agent component.
The macro generates a Tier-1 64-bit small-header per enum (LogVariant + frame_micro projection).
Visuals belong in reports, not chat, and may be used freely there when needed.

The NOTA decoder is extended by a registry of registered macros dispatched as an ordered list (first match wins) with conflict detection at registry-construction time; the captured blocks are interpreted by a consumer (Schema being one consumer).
Each plane has its own engine and traits but all three share the pattern of running code over an input message and returning an output message with populated data.

Why a component contract is split into separate signal-component and meta-signal-component repositories rather than living in the daemon repo. First, rebuild-churn isolation: peers that only need to talk to a component depend on the small contract repo, so they recompile only when the wire contract changes, not when the component internal logic, runtime, or documentation changes; keeping the contract in the daemon repo would rebuild every dependent on any internal edit. Second, security-sensitivity visibility: owner-only operations live in a distinct meta-signal repo, making security-sensitive edits obvious and letting clients that do not need owner authority avoid depending on it. Third, meta-signal is optional: some components have no owner relationship and only need the ordinary signal contract to talk to peers. The split is about compilation and dependency isolation and authority clarity, not about where state or logic lives.

Gap-fill from forwarded operator prompt: owner-signal surfaces should become core-signal surfaces; core owns the privileged control and library layer, while signal-* remains the ordinary messaging layer for safer callers and extensions.

PRETTY horizon computes the pre-derived helper variables Nix consumes (behaves-as/gating booleans, resolved magnitudes, lid-switch policy, trust-gated extra-groups) in typed Rust, NOT in Nix composition; Nix only uses the already-derived variables.

Asynchronous representation lives at the data-type level of the Signal Protocol: the message data types themselves carry the correlation IDs and lifecycle state tracking sent/queued/processing/replied transitions.

Tests must prove, not pretend: audit existing tests for genuineness, treat in-process synthetic-state tests as lesser proof than real-binary-via-Nix tests, and replace identified pretend-tests with full-stack Nix integration tests. *integration testing*

The schema authoring language is itself a macro that expands to assembled-schema data, and once bootstrapped the schema-of-schemas generates its own assembled and short-syntax forms, closing the self-hosting loop.

Audits feed into bead filing focused on (a) bringing code into constraint (constraint tests, falsifiable specs per skills/architectural-truth-tests.md, type-system witnesses) and (b) end-to-end sandboxed engine testing (Nix-flake-based integration tests exercising full daemon-to-daemon paths). Audits are the natural input to constraint-tightening + integration-coverage filing

A component's runtime LOGIC structure is a triad of Signal (reactive external surface), an internal-decision layer, and SEMA (single-writer state layer interfacing storage); this runtime triad lives inside the <component> daemon repo.
Possessing cryptographic identity is what lets an agent express opinions through signatures — existing in the Criome is having the power to sign.

What survives from the original interaction records: the two-languages distinction (internal effect vs external wire), effect-table match-driven dispatch as schema closing message-to-method mapping, and actor fan-out execution as what methods return. *design pattern*

The version-controlled server-backed atomic durability mechanism for component Sema databases must be built once as a reusable library of generic types and traits, not reimplemented per component. Every component is to have the option to version-control its state through this one shared mechanism. The reusable-library direction is firm; the exact generic mechanism is undesigned and to be settled by prior-art research and implementation experiments. Extends 29pb.
The public key IS the agent identifier — there is no separate UID storage; a single storage primitive (the key) carries every identifier length.

Canonical integration-test shape: real .schema files in real project paths drive Nix code generation; the spirit CLI and daemon are built by Nix; tests launch the binaries, the CLI sends real rkyv signal frames over a real Unix socket, the Nexus executor (with its own typed input/output) processes and returns, SEMA holds durable state, and the reply comes back through the whole chain end-to-end — every component driven off the schema. *integration testing*
Message-sent is an event surface with behavior: the mail dispatch system should emit or commit a typed MessageSent action that hooks, UI layers, routers, or subscribers can react to immediately.

Prometheus router USB backup network devices must be optional: their absence must not make router networking fail, and USB Ethernet or Wi-Fi devices plugged in after boot should be configured when they appear.
The macro emits NOTA encoding/decoding capability from the same schema source.

The InteractTrait abstraction and the interaction-actor concept are retracted as overengineered: a method call on an actor IS the interaction; schema-rust composer must not emit Interact<Input> or InteractionActor<Input> traits. *design pattern*
Schema may declare semantic constraints such as ordering, idempotence, cancellability, read fanout, or single-writer requirements only when those semantics are real.
The -specialist lane suffix is retired; system-specialist becomes system-operator, and similar specialist lanes rename to their base role.

The dispatcher assigns the subagent a report number inside the dispatcher's own role report subdirectory; subagent dispatches write into the dispatcher's role subdir, never into a separate assistant-named subdir.
Rename persona-llm-client to `agent`, dropping the persona- prefix.

For Crayon OS host maintenance, the maintainer has root SSH access on all cluster hosts but cannot SSH as Bird on Zeus; Bird's Zeus home-profile redeploy must use an existing root or maintainer-user path rather than direct Bird SSH.

NOTA parsing breaks down by object using positional ranges. Each block tracks its source span (line/column for both start and end on the original text). Each block carries methods/predicates to query its structure: is_square_bracket_block / is_parenthesis_block / is_brace_block; holds_single_root_object / holds_two_root_objects / holds_N_root_objects; recursive predicates like second_root_object_is_a_square_bracket_object / second_root_object_qualifies_as_a_symbol. Recursion: each root object inside a block is itself a typed/positioned block. The recursive parsing chain IS the chain of block-level queries.
Trace names are macro-emitted from the schema-defined enum variant structure rather than free-floating strings; the macro generated the variant so it already owns the activated object's identifier.

Schema parsing operates in multiple passes per source block. Pass 1 finds all identifier uses and their source locations. Pass 2 registers inline declarations into the namespace and resolves identifier references through namespace lookup. This supports the shorthand syntax where a header variant can be bare PascalCase looked up in namespace inline declaration auto-registered or explicit Variant Payload form. The multi-pass approach lets the engine know whether each identifier defines a type references a type or both — guesswork is eliminated by the source representation rather than rediscovered from lowered fields.
Agent is a supervised component used by other components that want pre-configured API agent calls, not a thin wrapper.

terminal-cell processes are forked via systemd so a cell survives a terminal-control restart — the cell is a systemd-managed process, not a child of terminal-control; on restart terminal-control rediscovers still-running cells from sema and reattaches to their control and data sockets, realizing the abduco survive-detach property through systemd (OS supervision) plus sema (durable instance registry).
The macro emits a VersionProjection between the current and next schema versions as the next-version-as-dependency upgrade path.
Cloud's Plan operation is renamed to Mutate, and its acknowledged-state reply is renamed Mutated. *replication*

Each mandatory pipeline step must be proven by real file-based tests: NOTA structural parse, the single shared codec in nota-next, schema read against the schema-of-schemas, macro/declaration assembly into macro-free Asschema data, the roots model, Rust emission of datatypes and derive-based trait impls over the shared codec, and the hand-written actor system running full constraints on spirit-next.

QEMU-backed VM checks run only on hosts explicitly designated or authorized for VM testing; agents verify the VM-testing host boundary before invoking qemu-backed NixOS VM checks or ask for the correct host, while ordinary non-VM-testing hosts remain compile and evaluation surfaces.
The Pi harness target shape is a Codex replacement.
Process-per-application is the confirmed model for terminal-cell. *virtualization*

Secret paths are scoped to the resource they serve: local-service tokens are scoped to the zone where the service lives, distinct from provider-scoped paths (e.g. cloudflare/api-token) which are global to the provider.

For persona specifically: signal-persona exists and is canonical and correct (NOT a retired compatibility shim, despite its README's false label); meta-signal-persona is currently missing and should be created.

Nexus covers any layer where code runs in response to typed input and returns typed output: internal IO, external calls (e.g. cloud component invoking Cloudflare CLI for DNS), and all user interfaces — unifying IO, external execution, and UI under one schema-driven execution plane.

For the lojix production-cutover validation specifically, the end-to-end deploy test runs against the full routed microVM target — a microVM with its own Criome domain and a reachable IP via the vm-testing module, microvm.nix plus a tap interface plus projected networking.hosts, currently designed and CI-tested on CriomOS next but deployed to no node. Go all the way: stand it up and prove the lojix daemon deploys a full OS to it and the deploy survives SSH disconnect. This sets the cutover-validation target for the lojix push and does not retire the general operator-nspawn e2e pattern btc0, which stays available for ordinary operator e2e checks. Honour constraint 5hir5bnz and do not break Prometheus networking while standing it up. *e2e*

OPEN: which component owns the terminal control and session surface (naming, registry, viewer-adapter policy, input-gate/injection policy, the signal-terminal control plane, durable session metadata) is still under research — candidates include a renamed persona-harness, a renamed terminal component, or no dedicated component at all. *virtualization*
Macros are a NOTA-layer concept (not only schema-layer): each macro is a typed data record with a name, a structural-match pattern, capture specs, and an applicable position.

An assembled-schema type declaration is visibility-tagged as Public(name, value) or Private(name, value); Public declarations are exported for library use, Private and local (including inline) declarations are not.
DeepSeek provider integration belongs in the agent component; deployment surfaces supply provider/model configuration and the secret handle to agent.
Internal-message-channel (actor) schemas live with the daemon because internal actors live inside the daemon's process.
The runtime LOGIC triad (Signal + internal-decision + SEMA) is distinct from the repo PACKAGING triad (component + signal-* + meta-signal-*).

A content/data daemon should be fairly privileged — ingesting and serving content is not especially dangerous — but never absolutely privileged; its privilege boundary is can-ingest-and-serve-content, not can-read-anything-on-the-system. *access control*
Two subagents cannot work on the same thing because they share the dispatcher's single lock.
introspect serves as a configurable trace destination for all components, deciding what and how to log, and provides a queriable source of tracing-derived intelligence.
Role lanes must use each agent exact role-name identifier.

Existing reports are agglomerated by topic into one primary report per major topic carrying the load-bearing substance; older topic reports retire when their substance fully migrates, or stay when they carry unique load-bearing detail.

An inline PascalCase type in a field is sugar: derive the field name from the type name and log the inline type as a Private local declaration, so a schema defines new types compactly inline; in emitted Rust this is a module-local non-exported type.

the schema language is ONE recursive shape: a root-layer struct with macro-expanded fields all the way down to scalar leaves; the top-level schema document IS a known struct named at the dialect level (the basic schema definition / Schema) with positional fields of known types; if a field is a vector it carries a variable number of macro-call instances; macros ARE structural expansion based on position; inner struct or enum declarations are themselves macros that fire at their positions; the objects inside a macro call become the MATCH against the macro pattern; enum bodies get re-parsed because the enum name carries forward; the recursion terminates at FINAL built-in macros expanding leaf structs or enums whose fields are only SCALAR types: vectors of integers, vectors of unit-variant enums, booleans, integers, strings; strings at the language level are typed newtypes around character sequences for proper identity not bare strings; this gives a uniform structural model from the root schema document down to every scalar position - position determines type, macros do structural expansion, leaves are scalars
A Spirit record is cited as the bracket-quoted description plus a (Spirit Kind short) parenthetical.

Single-field schema declarations without an explicit field name should lower and emit as newtypes, not named one-field structs. A PascalCase self-named field or single referenced type is a semantic type object; only multi-field structs derive lowercase field names. Generated Rust and NOTA should preserve this by using transparent newtypes so trace events like ObjectName do not become double-delimited one-field records.
Each design graph should be paired with the relevant code surface it depicts.
Agent hooks to mind for skills and accumulated context (a model call plus an agent equals a thinking process).
Agent is a new component abstraction; persona-claude/codex/gemini/pi/open-code are backends for agent.
Daemons stay free of NOTA decoding and avoid string surfaces except for actual user-authored string payloads.

Deploy multiple Gemma 4 quantization variants as separate selectable models in the llama-server router, each named by its quant in the modelId such as gemma-4-26b-a4b-bf16 and a 4-bit variant. The user picks quality versus speed per use rather than committing to one quant. Extends record 1033 bf16 by adding lower-bit options alongside it, not replacing it; the router serves each by name from its own GGUF set, sharing one mmproj per base model. *model inference*

Tests must exercise the actual execution chain with per-plane typed values throughout: each engine step takes and returns its plane's schema-object type (signal-engine Signal→Signal, nexus-engine Nexus→Nexus plus Signal-to-Nexus/Nexus-to-SEMA translations, sema-engine SEMA→SEMA), invoking engines through their trait surfaces and asserting on typed schema-emitted outputs. *integration testing*
This report-filename topic convention is documented as a new section in skills/reporting.md.

Making struct and enum final built-in syntax with no macros dissolves the enum-versus-macro ambiguity structurally, so the prefix-sigil macro marker is no longer needed and macros shrink to genuine user sugar.
Mencie, the persona multi-modal UI, is implemented as nexus schemas — each UI panel (mencie-audio, mencie-introspect, etc.) has its own nexus schema describing its data flow and return types.
Sub-agents should create feature branches for their repo work, and prompts that dispatch them should state that requirement.

Plain delimiters carry references and values: plain bracket with one element is a vector, plain brace with key-then-value type is a map, a bare symbol is a reference, plain paren is the value-and-tag layer; Optional is a tagged reference form and newtype is the degenerate one-field struct.
Pi harness spawn should be tested against Ghostty / terminal-cell spawning.
The topic-in-filename convention enables filename-based topic-grep across reports without opening them.
Graduated agent ID forms (shortest ~3 chars, short ~5, long ~7, full = the public key) are methods derived from the public key, not separately stored identifiers.

The operator-assistant lane is renamed to second-operator (parallel-main authority, not support), mirroring the designer/second-designer pattern; both base disciplines carry two parallel-main lanes by default.
Privacy is available to any record kind, not tied to specific kinds.
The full random record hash stays binary on the wire; only the short prefix appears in text.
Existing designer-assistant reports should be renamed into the designer lane so operator and other roles can see them.
Topic labels are drawn from a controlled topic vocabulary maintained per workspace through use.

A file's entire structure is itself a typed tree of nodes — structural forms — each of which recognises a block by its shape and recursively decodes its children. There is no parser to hand-write: the grammar is the type, the type is the reader, and the recursive shape match stands in for parsing. This is the structural realization behind the aski goal — elegant syntax is not produced by parsing logic but falls out of declaring the typed nodes as data.
Bare signal-persona references in docs are correct and must NOT be migrated away.

terminal-control is NOT folded into harness (AI-only, would orphan non-harness cells) nor into orchestrate (which owns coordination identity not delivery identity); orchestrate owns cell instance lifecycle policy as an order plane.
The Pi harness ships with packaged Pi extensions.
terminal-cell stays the abduco primitive and absorbs the input-gate writer and prompt-matcher currently duplicated with terminal.
terminal-cell is NOT a triad engine component and NOT a managed service daemon; its current non-triad shape is incidental — it predates the triad engine — not a deliberate end-state. *virtualization*

criome is a universal agreement machine for authorizations - the agreement-and-authorization organ of Telos, the meta-project, not Telos itself. The quorum is criome's universal primitive: everything is a quorum. Each principal runs more than one node and asks its own quorum to make its attestations reliable and its timestamps credible - forging an attestation would require compromising a threshold of the principal's own nodes rather than a single node, so a self-quorum across one's own nodes is a reliability mechanism, not only multi-party trust across different principals. One quorum primitive serves both, scoped by membership: a principal's own nodes for reliability and credible time, multiple principals for cross-party trust.
Per-type Migration trait includes a self-check / peer-coordination message that knows whether to consult the next-version daemon

Stable public signal schemas belong in contract repositories separate from daemon logic crates, so consumers compile against stable interface crates and are not rebuilt merely because a daemon's internal logic changes. Generated Rust for the contract may be checked in as a reference, while build-time consumers must avoid duplicating foreign trait implementations or creating unnecessary wrapper newtypes.

When an agent passes surfaces many open psyche questions, the move is to LEAN on pattern-recognition of psyche intent and propose an MVP that matches the letter of intent as much as possible, then surface only the truly-uncertain remainder. Surfacing 27 questions when 24 of them have inferable answers from the captured intent corpus is the wrong shape. Propose the MVP; ask only what genuinely cannot be answered from intent.

NotaBodyDecode is the semantic decode entry point. Document and block decode surfaces strip their wrapper context and delegate to the body decoder rather than carrying independent semantic parsing logic.
Beads are coordination aids, not a substitute for implementation; when the psyche asks an agent to implement work, the agent should work the bead or code path immediately unless blocked.

NOTA pipe text should use a normal escape character for literal close-marker text instead of widening pipe fences indefinitely. The string codec should keep one readable pipe-text delimiter shape and escape payload content that would otherwise close it.
Schema files create the data types for the libraries they serve and may live side by side with Rust source when that is the simplest working layout; the schema remains the source of data-type truth.
Actor-native migrations should change the generator and runtime source of truth instead of stopping at compatibility bridges; no backward compatibility, best design only.
designer implementation may stay higher-level than operators; designer carries less implementation depth per pass than operator does

Component databases use a .sema file extension instead of .redb, hiding redb behind our own .sema file type so the file name states it is specifically a sema-redb database. Reinforces the direction that the storage file name declares its architectural role rather than exposing the raw redb engine. *storage*

Byte-0 namespace splits by golden ratio (~0.39 / 0.61) into two sections; owner contract takes one section, public/ordinary contract takes the other; per-component choice with compile-time macro enforcement (both contracts MUST agree on split or compilation error); default is owner=small public=big; opens potential for single-socket-per-component design where the byte-0 section encodes which namespace the message belongs to
Schema work must be tested end-to-end with actual .schema files and local relative imports *integration testing*
Schema files can be split by contract or schema-file type so parsing is per file and positional over root NOTA objects rather than one overloaded monolithic file.

Gap-fill from forwarded designer prompt: the schema macro system is the basis for domain-specific interaction languages across components and actors, turning delimiter-shaped NOTA into typed input-output interfaces.

When the psyche injects a short piece of information mid-task — a report, a clarification, a bit of context, often delivered by hitting escape so the agent reads it sooner — that is NOT an instruction to stop. The agent must keep working on its task. Only an explicit instruction to stop is an interruption. Agents must not drop their work or go passive because the psyche added information; the default is to absorb the info and continue executing. Dropping the work to check in is wrong behavior and wastes the chance to get work done.

Schema file is a STRUCT at root - implied by the .schema extension; no explicit root declaration needed. First field of the schema struct is the imports/exports namespace (curly-bracket map). Subsequent positional field(s) are input/output struct(s) in square brackets. When both input and output are present they may live as a single combined struct field (since-both-are-present framing); single-sided schemas have only the present side. Optionality applies to which sub-fields appear inside the struct, not to having separate sections.
Version handover should be explicit daemon protocol
The CLI boundary is NOTA, while component-to-component messaging must be binary rkyv; tests should prove both boundaries rather than only exercising in-memory Rust types.

The syntax used in reports/operator/226-asschema-first-final-data-2026-05-28.md and syntax of the same shape is obsolete. Future reports and examples must not treat that syntax as current schema or ASSchema design.
Cloud component implementation should use the existing old NOTA / old signal macro stack, matching the production Spirit-era approach, rather than waiting for the new schema stack.
Version migration is per type

Psyche-facing audits and presentations should show the primordial typed text forms at the layers where text is the representation, including NOTA and schema source, so the line of thought is visible through concrete code rather than only abstract prose.
Active report refinements should use the v2 filename form instead of silently editing the original report.

Extension of Spirit 1467 inline enum-payload pattern. The inline enum-body list can declare variant NAMES without distinguishing unit vs data-carrying in the header. When a variant name in the inline list is defined elsewhere as a newtype/struct/named type the variant is data-carrying with that type as its payload; when not defined elsewhere it is a unit variant. The header doesn't need to know which — the codec resolves against the type table. Lets the inline enum-body form fit data-carrying variants while staying compact. Example — Output [RecordAccepted Rejected Busy MaintenanceMode] works even if RecordAccepted and Rejected are defined elsewhere as data-carrying newtypes (wrapping SemaReceipt and SignalRejection respectively) and Busy/MaintenanceMode are unit. Sugar feature; cleaner schemas; less paren noise at variant-list positions.
Router-acknowledgement = delivery durable on harness-side ack *message queuing*
Visuals in reports MUST be mermaid diagrams; no ASCII text-block diagrams (they are error-prone and not real diagrams). Encode in skills/reporting.md
Register assistant as a workspace role/lane for this agent: the assistant role helps the psyche with personal affairs and must have orchestration support plus its own reports/assistant/ report lane.

Proposed macro-resolution architecture: the built-in type forms - Enum, Struct, Vec, Option, KeyValue - are variants of a closed MACRO SPACE. Schema positions that expect a macro resolve a node against this space by DUAL DISPATCH: first look at the head keyword, and if it is a reserved built-in keyword such as Vec Option KeyValue dispatch directly by keyword and SKIP structural mapping; otherwise the node is a user type declaration and it does STRUCTURAL mapping by shape - a parenthesis holding an inner parenthesis is an enum, a bracket is a struct or newtype. Either path ends by mapping onto the macro variant. Builds on the existing schema-next MacroRegistry which today matches only by structure and position; this adds a keyword fast-path. Relates to record 1034 collections and 1044 the schema Kind enum. Proposed by the psyche pending confirmation.
Durable Spirit identity should not rely on reusable incremental numbers; unique hashes are a better identity direction, while recency tracking should use daemon-stamped time.
Automate the auditor; DeepSeek is the main auditor going forward (audits are mechanical, suit a smaller model good at rules-and-flaws detection)

Prometheus live switch and promotion operations that may disrupt SSH or Wi-Fi must be launched as durable systemd transient units so the operation continues even if the agent's SSH session drops and reconnect is needed.

Persona Pi is a real persona-component triad — the Pi harness adapted for the persona system. Lives as its own component-tree (daemon + signal-persona-pi working contract + owner-signal-persona-pi policy contract + thin pi CLI client). Runs inside a terminal-cell (the persona-terminal-shaped surface that handles Unix-side I/O), but is NOT confined to it: Persona Pi can also talk directly to the harness API. The terminal-cell is the Unix-interaction conduit; the harness-API path is the more accessible logic surface, used because Pi is extensively customizable and exposes far more than terminal I/O.

The recording system's intent-capture stage (currently sketched in /145 §6) is a per-call runtime LLM function, not an agent. It receives speech-to-text output, extracts intent for logging, may rephrase to clean STT typos / structure thoughts better, and may route sections of the prompt to different long-lived agents based on topic. The function has no persistent identity; it's invoked per audio span. Long-lived agents (the ones with cryptographic identity per intent 120) consume the routed prompt sections; the intent-capture itself stays stateless. This refines /145's design — the extractor was described neutrally as 'the model'; the function-vs-agent distinction makes the call's shape explicit and unlocks the per-call context provisioning pattern.

NOTA braces are the native structural key-value map delimiter. Schema reads a brace object as key-value structure, not as a schema macro form. Key-value-ness belongs to the low-level NOTA structure; macros may consume these structures at schema positions.

The criome psyche-facing approval component is named mentci - the existing mentci-egui and mentci-lib repositories. The spelling Menchie that appears in earlier capture, including the registered referent Menchie and Spirit record 7x5z, was a speech-to-text error and is not the name. Canonical: mentci lowercase, Mentci as a capitalized proper noun. The Menchie referent and record 7x5z should migrate to mentci when referent-rename tooling allows.

If the psyche passes the recording microphone to the wife while it is active, the recording system should recognise the voice change and route her speech to her own persona instance, spawned dynamically. The wife's instance is separate from the psyche's; intent captured belongs to her as a distinct psyche with her own intent layer. *natural language processing*

Upgrade mechanism is realized as SEMA operations on the Asschema. The same library that handles record-level SEMA operations also handles schema-changing operations — they are the same kind of operation acting on different objects.

ESSENCE.md holds only the universal workspace essence — how agents behave across every role and repo. It carries nothing role-specific, repo-specific, or technically-specific: no two-roles framing, no Rust-module, daemon-edge, trace-edge, or strings-at-the-edge detail. Workspace INTENT.md is general workspace rules. Repo-specific essence and intent live in the per-repo INTENT.md, not the workspace files; provenance references are stripped.
Intent logging uses Spirit

The recording system detects intent boundaries via spoken keyword markers in the psyche's speech: variations of 'Beginning of intent' and 'End of intent' (including 'Beginning intent', 'End intent', etc.). The recorder is always running so the model carries full surrounding context; the markers tell it which spans to extract as discrete intent entries. *natural language processing*

Spirit record fields should vary by record kind rather than every record carrying every field - eliminate the fields a given kind does not use. Concretely a private-bearing record carries a privacy field while an ordinary public record omits it, reducing the total field count and giving each kind a tighter purpose-fit shape. A better architecture than the current one-shape-fits-all positional record.
Schemas need namespace imports, with local Spirit definitions enough for the MVP

Build configuration is itself a NOTA struct with fields — the same single-NOTA-argument rule that governs daemon and CLI input also governs build configuration. Testing-build is a configurable field on that struct; how the build switches between production and testing modes is the same NOTA-shaped declaration as the rest of the build config.
Sandbox-only retrofit packages never touch production
Ordered-vector-of-boxes NOTA schema notation deserves its own library

Sub-ID is a SignalCore primitive type for entities that are 'a thing' but do not have their own Criome identity. Sub-ID = content-address fingerprint of the launching job's full spec. Use case: agent calls, processes within agents. Stored in ARCA as own type.
Contract schema top-level is a vector of root-verb enums

The lojix ordinary contract signal-lojix carries the WatchDeployments and WatchCacheRetention streaming subscriptions from day one not deferred. The port accepts being the first component to prove schema-derived streaming-subscription emission through schema-next and schema-rust-next; if the generator cannot yet emit streams that enhancement is on the lojix port path rather than dropping streaming from the contract. Deploy phase events and cache-retention transitions are pushed not polled.

The CriomOS image for cloud nodes such as DigitalOcean is a new CriomOS image type, built declaratively from the CriomOS configuration and kept minimal and content-sized, with the per-node configuration declared in the cluster data — the horizon cluster proposal — rather than produced by snapshotting a converted running droplet.

The square-bracket string idea is not meant as schema-dependent delimiter reuse: the psyche is reasoning that a string is conceptually a vector of characters, analogous to capitalized True and False exposing bool as an enum-like concept.
Persona-pi setup is packaged in Nix and hides Nix paths from Pi internal view. *packaging*
Assembled schema should carry fully qualified names

Sema-upgrade-daemon starts FIRST on engine boot — before any persona daemon. Its first task is to check whether a database upgrade is needed (compare each daemon's stored schema-version-hash against the version-hash that daemon's current code declares). Symmetric to spirit being LAST per intent record 17 (the apex of the cognitive authority chain). Resolves /275 Point 3 and /276 critical point 10c. Sema-upgrade-daemon is engine-pre-zero infrastructure owned by the engine manager.

Everything in the system is data conforming to a schema-defined type — including a macro itself, which is just a value of a specialized struct, where pattern and template are ordinary typed-data fields rather than special kinds. This is the unifying lens for the schema substrate. There is no privileged escape-hatch representation. Macro definitions, their patterns, and their templates are all typed data in the same schema-NOTA-rkyv tri-form as records and daemon configuration.
Schema imports and exports are part of the root schema structure: schemas consume names from other schemas and export names for assembly, with conflict checking across imported exports.

Square brackets are the vector delimiter structurally, but when the expected schema type is String or a string newtype, that bracket form represents a string value. So [] is not always semantically a vector at typed schema positions; typed reading can interpret bracket content as string data.
Keep domain-criome contract vocabulary provider-neutral and record-only
When agent tooling can still operate, treat transient connection warnings as non-blocking and resume the active assigned job instead of detouring into connection debugging.
Single-name enum variant record carries the same named type

macros ARE sugar syntax in the schema layer - the brace-enum form is implemented as a macro that expands to the canonical paren-list form; macros run on their objects at the positions they are specified to fire; the macro engine supports MULTIPLE MATCH CRITERIA: delimiter (paren/brace/square/pipe-text), internal shape (what the contents look like), number of root objects, qualification-as-symbol (PascalCase candidate, kebab-case, etc), and combinations of these; multiple matches dispatch on the most specific match; there are now TWO equivalent ways to define a payload-carrying enum in the schema namespace: the wordier paren form ((Variant Payload) ...) and the brace sugar form {Variant Payload ...} - both expand to the same Asschema; the macro shape itself is two-position: first object is the PATTERN it receives (what it matches), second object is the TEMPLATE for how it decomposes/expands; macros are the universal extension mechanism, not adhoc engine code
Record 151 (DeepSeek subsumes-into-persona-pi) is superseded; the real intent is a workspace-native Persona LLM client library, not subsumption into the Pi harness wrap
Agents may need to create and adopt specialized lanes or roles such as `nota-designer` when a topic demands it, rather than being limited to the pre-existing role list.

Promotion direction at parse time: default to the higher classification (qualified-symbol over string). Demoting from qualified-symbol to string is easy when type context requires; promoting from string to qualified-symbol later is hard. So everything that COULD be a qualified symbol is classified as one at parse time; the schema layer demotes when its type system says string-only. *lexical analysis*

Agents should size effort to the request: a simple review or a what-do-you-think wants a lightweight read-and-judge pass or a single agent, not a multi-agent adversarial workflow; reserve expensive fan-out for explicit thoroughness requests or work too large for one context

A core schema file is read as a struct whose type name is derived from its filename, mirroring Rust modules. The file does not restate that root struct name; the reader knows it from the path. The root struct contains a key-value map of datatype names to raw NOTA datatype objects, so a large core schema example should first demonstrate raw NOTA reading into raw datatype structures before higher schema lowering or Rust emission.

Operator-lane subagents must be treated as asynchronous side work: dispatch returns control to the main agent, and the main agent should keep working or answer new psyche prompts instead of blocking on subagent completion. Waiting for a subagent is only acceptable when explicitly requested or when the psyche is not waiting on the main agent for anything else.

In schema struct/record declarations field names are DERIVED from PascalCase type names by lowercasing - there is no explicit field name syntax. The form is just a list of type names: Entry (Topic Kind Summary Context Certainty Quote). Each type name lowercases to its field name (topic kind summary etc). Operator/180 added explicit SchemaField name+type to support field-name-divergent-from-type-name cases; this is reversed by the new rule.

Composite designer role — the designer agent runs Claude AND Codex in parallel against the same prompt, then selects (or merges) the best output. The Codex parallel runs in Pi (Persona Pi); the Claude side runs in its own harness. This is the first concrete composite-role shape. Other roles may compose differently, but the designer composite is psyche-specified.
Root-level persona engine takes over component upgrade management; CriomOS no longer needs redeploy per component upgrade *orchestration*

In schema member declarations, lowercase names bind fields for code access, while PascalCase creates a reusable type in the current context; a type becomes library/export visible by being declared as a top-level namespace entry. The namespace is conceptually the struct of declared types, while enums represent category divisions with payload data carried by variants.
Skills may carry tool-version front matter
Future component work should use the latest bottom architecture around Signal, Sema, and Signal executor rather than older ad hoc component shapes.

The schema-derived VersionProjection macro can decide its own emission module structure inline or separate without psyche choice gating it. The macro is already in the code deriving from the schema difference; module organization is an implementation detail the macro encapsulates. Original assumption was macro would derive module selection from the schema diff shape itself.

videographer is a new main workspace role: video as craft covering filming and screen capture, editing, captioning, encoding, and publishing preparation. It parallels the poet craft role. The psyche created it and assigned it to the Claude session that handled the video captions research. Lock file orchestrate/videographer.lock, reports under reports/videographer/
data-carrying variants take the first seven enum slots (0-6); unit variants come after; this slot-assignment policy makes adding a new unit variant a no-op upgrade on the wire format

Do not leave cloud/domain runtime plane schemas as concept placeholders; the desired direction is actual implementation artifacts. If generator support is missing, name that blocker explicitly rather than presenting concept schemas as the destination.

Nexus can have a daemon internal interface distinct from external Signal and SEMA surfaces. Inside Nexus there may be a recursive computation engine that can call back into itself and provide a future runtime control substrate for prioritizing actor work handling busy SEMA capacity preserving logging and deciding when to tell clients the system is too busy.

Testing trace must prove runtime use of the schema-defined triad interfaces and runtime actors. A passing trace test should demonstrate that Signal, Nexus, and SEMA actor boundaries were entered through their engine/interface methods at runtime, not merely that trait names or event strings exist in source files. *integration testing*
Production Spirit should implement an explicit collect-removal-candidates operation that archives or emits reviewed Zero-certainty records before retracting them from the hot store.

Schema sigils type symbols: key-side sigils can be read as symbol variants whose payload is the paired value shape, so the schema layer can match on the key variant and value delimiter while still preserving NOTA key-value structure.

The EnumVariants structural macro in schema-next should support compact self-tagged variants where the variant tag equals its payload type name: a one-element parenthesised form expands to the two-element tag-and-type form; a parenthesised name with an inline brace body declares the variant and registers that named struct in the namespace; and a parenthesised name with an inline bracket body declares the variant and registers that named enum in the namespace, all removing the name repetition
PascalCase booleans are unit variants

The dispatch precedence among competing reference forms — currently hand-written match-arm order, built-in heads then declared macros then the generic application catch-all, pinned only by tests — must be reified as an explicit typed value expressible in NOTA, so every reader and the resolver itself consult one canonical declared precedence rather than implicit ordering. Applies v0n6 to resolution order: the dispatch grammar is itself typed structural data, not hidden control flow.
Cluster operator is an operator-specialized role, and ordinal prefixes copy the whole following role
Backpressure and deeper runtime-control machinery are deferred future runtime work, not part of the current production-oriented implementation slice.

Privacy protection for personal-affairs information should be programmed into the lowest-level/basic agent instruction files so ordinary agents do not need to inspect private information unless the psyche explicitly tells them to do so.
All components need schemas, with Spirit, Orchestrate, Mind, and Persona as preferred pilots.
Create a public spirit-next repository as the running schema-derived Spirit pilot rather than only keeping the prototype inside schema-rust-next.

For supervised browser-agent work, the preferred browser surface is the human's main Chrome profile rather than a temporary guest automation profile, so logged-in state and familiar browser context are available when safe.
Spirit needs topic catalog queries *query processing*
Spirit next entries carry one clarified description and no verbatim field

Schemas inside the schema component are stored in a much more efficient binary representation than NOTA text format. NOTA is the SOURCE/authoring format — human-readable, edited by hand or by tooling. The schema component holds the COMPILED runtime representation — packed structures keyed by short-header for O(1) lookup, with the version-diff and namespace-slot tables pre-computed. The NOTA→compiled-schema compilation is the build-time step (per spirit 391); the schema component is the runtime side that serves the compiled product. *storage*

Assembled schema needs a built-in struct representation that uses a key-value brace map: each field key is the field name and each field value is the type reference. This is the long-form data object that authored struct sugar expands into.

Mirror topology is per-system: one mirror per node, symmetric with the per-system router. The per-system router carries an authenticated object/head notice to the remote mirror; the notice names the store and announced head, and may include a source mirror endpoint for fetch. The receiving mirror owns the fetch/restore action after receiving the authenticated notice, while Router remains the transport/policy fabric and criome remains authentication-only. The first mirror-focused slice should type this notification contract before hardening the automatic fetch runtime.
Import header entries must not mix arities; each variant has one fixed positional schema.

Plane identity should be represented by matchable data-carrying variants when runtime needs to branch by plane; the purpose of the proposed Sema Nexus Signal enum was to match on the plane while carrying the message, not to duplicate a separate kind tag beside an envelope.
Designer may close gaps via pattern-based-decision when past intent establishes a workspace pattern that obviously applies; mark explicitly as pattern-based
Sema upgrade should become a component for updating Sema databases

Spirit search may grow beyond simple filters toward weighted keyword or recency scoring, potentially using the Nexus language for richer query logic; this is exploratory direction rather than a settled immediate production requirement. *information retrieval*
Import/name clashes fail within a schema context

Schema language macros must expand into a fully one-to-one assembled tree that describes all generated types, API endpoint variant names, and the input structs carried by those variants before Rust code is emitted.
operators read peer operator reports first

Cloud compute nodes use a billing-hour-aware reuse pool: an idle recently-created node still within its already-paid billing window is reused for a matching request instead of delete-and-recreate, and idle nodes are reaped before they cross into a new paid billing period. The keep-warm duration (how long a node is kept warm and reusable by default after it spins down) is a per-provider setting derived from the provider billing granularity; for Hetzner (hourly billing) it is 59 minutes, anchored to the billing-hour boundary so the full paid hour stays reusable and the reaper fires before a second hour starts. The larger benefit is latency from skipping create, boot and install, not only the reclaimed paid-hour cost.

References to Prometheus in the recording-system design (and elsewhere) name a specific cluster node by accident — the canonical reference is the CriomOS role 'large-ai-node' (NodeService::LargeAi per horizon's cluster taxonomy). Prometheus today fills the role; tomorrow a different node may. Workspace design language should name the role, not the host. Refresh existing references to Prometheus that should be role-level. *infrastructure as code*

SEMA means database work: the real SEMA plane is the component that writes durable state to the database file, currently redb, and a future rename to a .sema extension may make that role explicit. *storage*

Cloud component surface splits Mutate verbs onto meta-signal-cloud (privileged) and Query verbs onto signal-cloud (public). Cloudflare is treated as a state the cloud daemon reflects; refresh-by-querying is public; mutations require owner authority. Generalises to other providers and to any component whose state surface is a reflected external resource.

The semicolon-bracket pseudo-NOTA report header format that many recent reports use at the top is a drift or hallucination — it does not match skills/reporting.md §Report header which documents an italicised one-liner after the title. Reports drifted to a NOTA-styled header that mimics Spirit intent record shape; this was never a ratified workspace decision. Audit other skills for similar weird kinks or hallucinated guidance that does not trace to a clear psyche intent or pre-existing skill rule.
Persona Pi is the Codex advisor harness for Persona

The psyche is dissatisfied that schema-stack work so far has read as marketing and claims rather than a demonstrably-working pipeline they can see. Demonstrations must SHOW real artifacts and actually run end to end, not assert that the system works. Reinforces record 1006 prove-not-pretend as a PRESENTATION discipline: show the system working step by step with real inputs and outputs - the schema you wrote, the assembled schema it lowered to, the Rust it emitted, the test that ran - rather than telling the psyche it works.
Schema-derived upgrade code is compile-time optional per main-next pair
Spirit's intent gate should use a strong open-weight model rather than a small one such as Gemma, because intent is too important to under-resource; the specific provider is still being chosen

A plain vector in NOTA and asschema denotes homogeneous elements. Therefore assembled root syntax must not show Input and Output as bare sibling vector elements if they are different types; the root representation must use a true common wrapper or a struct/field shape that preserves their different types.

Public-only and private-only record query shortcut verbs are desirable because they make normal Spirit usage more ergonomic than requiring callers to spell the full privacy-filter query each time. *query processing*

The CriomOS VM-testing node gains a durable on-demand mode for continual production-side OS testing — a persistent VM node defined in cluster data and homed on prometheus that is not booted by default but started on demand, so the production OS can be tested in a real VM on the production host as an ongoing development-and-validation target. The host-untouched boundary for this durable node is scoped: prometheus MAY carry the typed VmHost KVM-hosting capability declared in its generation, since that is the infrastructure that lets it host the VMs, while prometheus networking, the router, and production function stay untouched. The not-booted-by-default mode keeps the guest and its routed networking inactive until a test is started, and any activation on the live router uses BootOnce rather than a live switch-to-configuration. This extends the VM-testing node feature y1v5, cncj placement of the routed test VM on prometheus, and se72 cutover validation from one-off transient runs toward a durable continually-available target, and reconciles with 7let by permitting the KVM-host infrastructure touch while keeping everything else untouched. Its node-service shape follows qkvx as a real typed horizon-rs NodeService variant authored in datom.nota and projected typed rather than a string-keyed hack, superseding the garbage VmTesting work tracked by bead primary-wvey.
Multi-version dispatch protocol: CLI sends to the next-version daemon; next-version daemon coordinates back with main; missing-next returns error logged-as-failed

Schema namespace supports recursive type references — entries in the namespace can reference other namespace entries, allowing recursive data type definitions. Logic can be defined in the namespace through these recursive references. This is how the meta-schema bootstraps itself within its own format.
Development branches should be role-namespaced Git lanes

A browser agent should be usable in supervised scout mode: it scans visible account pages, reports the UI state and possible next steps step by step, and waits for human decisions before taking consequential actions.
Production Spirit should support querying intent records by numeric identifier, including exact identifiers and identifier ranges. *query processing*

Spirit query ergonomics should let agents ask for qualitative depth such as deeper or very deep instead of making agents choose exact counts or absolute time windows for routine topic searches. *query processing*
Bird persona gets a local operator-controlled operating-system update path on Zeus
Lojix deployment is not the problem to avoid; the safety issue is local resource pressure during build/evaluation, so operator work should keep using lojix while making the workload safe.

Browser automation design should consider two paths: an optional Playwright MCP server for direct agent browser tooling, and a browser-use-style delegated smaller/faster LLM path where the primary agent provides intent and a subordinate browser agent scouts and clicks.
NOTA records do not carry field names; schema names require named type boundaries
Root header variants are limited; nested header variants are broad.
Persona-Pi should package standard Pi extensions through Nix *packaging*
Component schema defines regular signal owner signal and sema headers

Schema-emitted objects should have optional-compilable logging hooks — feature-gated code at the macro/emitter layer that logs object usage to a log socket. The logging is OFF in production builds, ON in testing builds; the witness flows through the same socket substrate the runtime already uses. *logging*

The explicit privacy query should expose all privacy selectors as operations — at most inclusive (the main one), exact equal, and at least — not just at-most; build them all. They sit on the explicit privacy-query subtype that carries the privacy level, while the normal query stays Zero-only. *query processing*

The workspace context that grounds Spirit 1449's most-public default is development-mode for public repositories — collaborative work on shared open-source software where most intent captures inform future agents and contributors. The empirical record shape is predominantly workspace principles, Decisions, Constraints meant for future-agent / collaborator consumption. Default privacy is Zero (public/open per Spirit 1463 Magnitude-axis framing) because this data shape calls for it. If the workspace context shifted (private personal-journal mode), the default could reconsider.

Internal SEMA and database work is also a schema language of messages, commands, and responses; a component may keep storage inside the daemon first and split it into its own daemon later using the same message language.

Psyche reports should let the psyche follow the line of thought all the way back to the basics: when a report refreshes or audits prior work, it should re-ground the current issues from first principles instead of assuming the reader already has the whole context loaded.

The schema layer is the programmable composability layer on top of NOTA: it uses typed schema nodes and macros to express complex data-driven interfaces and behavior trees, including Signal, Nexus, SEMA, and internal engine sub-behavior, while preserving unambiguous quote-free NOTA encoding.

Reports gain a 'kind' and 'topic' dimension, mirroring persona-spirit's intent record structure (kind + topic + summary). Report kinds candidate set: Design / Review / Audit / Research / Proposal / Handover / Brief. The kind labels what the report IS structurally; the topic labels what the report is ABOUT. Together with the number, kind and topic make the report tree easier to query and harder to confuse. Eventually reports move into persona-mind which will surface kind-and-topic as first-class query keys; until then, the dimension is encoded in filename and an explicit header inside each report. The reporting skill (skills/reporting.md) gets edited to absorb this discipline.
schema diff operations have three families — Add, Remove, Modify — and Modify subdivides into ContainerEmbed, EnumWrap, Reorder, and KeyChange sub-cases

The workspace should be able to test UI and visual components end-to-end in a sandbox — launch real applications the component affects, run the component, and observe the actual visual effect (theme change, screen warmth, brightness) while watching for system freezes and errors — to verify a component actually works, not merely compiles. Sandboxes can run via systemd and spawn on a node such as Prometheus. chroma (theme/warmth/brightness) is the first target. *e2e*

Hard deletion of intent records is inevitable on a long enough timeline because storage is finite, so the design must treat hard deletion as a deliberate decision to plan for rather than a state to forbid

The first end-to-end production milestone is the spirit -> vcs -> criome -> router -> mirror chain. When Spirit accepts a new log object, Spirit asks the local criome daemon to authenticate the exact content-addressed object/event for propagation. Router is the transport fabric for the propagation; remote criome/mirror participants receive the authenticated event and the remote mirror fetches/restores the announced object state. The schema-derived runtime is driven by THREE ENGINES - a signal engine, a nexus engine, and a sema engine - whose traits DEFINE THE ORDER of execution. The signal engine processes the incoming signal and pushes it to the nexus engine; the nexus engine has a trait method invoked when a signal is pushed to it, processes and gates it, and pushes onward to the sema engine; then the flow REVERSES - the sema reply returns through nexus and back out as the signal output. Push happens only on success: an invalid message is answered to the client directly with a rejection without proceeding; a valid signal pushes to nexus, and if nexus accepts it proceeds to sema. The push methods take the next engine as a parameter so the trait signatures themselves sequence signal then nexus then sema then back. Refines records 964 967 970 and 989 990 by naming three engines whose traits encode the ordering.

Nexus is the execution engine, not executor. The executor concept and the signal-executor library role are superseded by the nexus execution plane; component request-execution belongs to nexus going forward.

criome contracts can be programmed to escalate a decision to a named adjudicator - a mechanical quorum, an LLM-assisted panel, a smarter agent, or the psyche, the human owner - whose signed content-addressed verdict criome only verifies. That verdict is a closed typed outcome over an already-submitted content-addressed object, not a carrier for newly-authored answer content. Criome only authorizes objects that come in for authorization. Program answers live inside the program's declared closed answer set. The Mentci/criome adjudication path is vote-on-existing-object: approve the suggested object, reject it, or defer/non-judge/escalate. If Mentci lets the psyche author a NOTA value - for example an LLM prompt, a replacement answer proposal, or another typed object - that is a separate editor and object-creation flow; the authored value must be admitted as its own content-addressed object before criome can authorize it. Two properties make the ladder humble and adaptive. First, non-judgment is a first-class adjudicator output: an adjudicator may decline to rule and escalate instead of forcing a verdict. Second, the default LLM adjudicator is trained to lean toward rendering non-judgment - abstaining and escalating to a smarter agent or agents and to a psyche or psyches - rather than deciding a case it is not confident in or that is too contentious. So the cheap default judge resolves the clear cases and bows out of the hard ones, spending scarce smart-agent and human attention only where it is genuinely needed; the psyche is the highest-authority and lowest-availability adjudicator. This is the architectural expression of intent-is-primordial: when a contract or a judge cannot or should not decide, it defers upward, ultimately to the human. Reaching the psyche adjudicator depends on a psyche-facing UI: until that UI exists the EscalateToPsyche outcome is intentionally an inert dead-letter and not a defect, because the terminal human rung is gated on the interface that lets a psyche receive and answer escalations.
